highlights_headline: Head of the 4.151.x line — FreeType-based font support for Windows Nano Server has landed so far.

bullets.lead: FreeType used for font rendering on Windows Nano Server
bullets.detail: Windows Nano Server lacks the DirectWrite and GDI font stack; SkiaSharp now falls back to FreeType on that platform so fonts render correctly in containerized Nano Server workloads.

contributor_summaries.jeffska: FreeType font fallback for Windows Nano Server environments
